instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor gear ratio during operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall calculate gear ratio using Engine_RPM and Output_Shaft_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Ratio > Ratio_Limit THEN Gear_Ratio_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall validate gear ratio against expected values.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect mismatch when Actual_Gear_Ratio differs from Expected_Gear_Ratio.

L4_requirements: IF Actual_Gear_Ratio != Expected_Gear_Ratio THEN Gear_Ratio_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect abnormal ratio during gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall monitor ratio during gear engagement phase.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Ratio > Engagement_Ratio_Limit THEN Gear_Ratio_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect persistent gear ratio mismatch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when ratio mismatch persists longer than Ratio_Time_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Ratio_Error > Ratio_Limit AND Ratio_Duration > Ratio_Time_Limit THEN Gear_Ratio_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect clutch slip using gear ratio monitoring.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect slip when Gear_Ratio deviates beyond Slip_Ratio_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Ratio_Error > Slip_Ratio_Limit THEN Clutch_Slip_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate gear ratio fault sources.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify fault source when Gear_Ratio_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting during ratio faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when Gear_Ratio_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Ratio_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear when ratio fault occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when Gear_Ratio_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect abnormal output shaft speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Output_Shaft_RPM deviates from expected value.

L4_requirements: IF Output_Shaft_RPM > Max_RPM THEN Output_Speed_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear ratio faults when ratio returns to expected range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear ratio fault when Actual_Gear_Ratio matches Expected_Gear_Ratio.
